about.eventDescription: The Inter Departmental Programming Contest and Math Olympiad are premier flagship events designed to foster algorithmic problem-solving, analytical thinking, and mathematical prowess among university students. Operating as a core talent-discovery platform, these events challenge young minds to apply complex logic and coding skills to solve real-world computational problems under extreme time constraints. This dual-event structure serves as a critical stepping stone for students aiming to represent the institution in national and international arenas like the ICPC and national hackathons.
about.clubDescription: Green University Computer Club (GUCC) is a dynamic, student-driven non-profit organization operating in collaboration with the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), with a thriving community of over 7,000+ members. GUCC is dedicated to cultivating aspiring professionals and building the next generation of tech leaders in Bangladesh.

achievements.title: HackTheAI 2025
achievements.description: Organized one of Bangladesh's largest university AI hackathons, featuring nationwide participation, industry mentors, expert judges, and sponsorship from SmythOS.

achievements.title: GUB CSE Carnival 2024
achievements.description: Successfully organized a three-day flagship technology festival featuring programming contests, AI & cybersecurity talks, panel discussions, gaming competitions, and innovation showcases.

achievements.title: Inter Department Programming Contest (IDPC)
achievements.description: Hosted one of the university's premier competitive programming contests, attracting hundreds of participants and promoting algorithmic problem-solving among students.

achievements.title: Career & Industry Tech Summit
achievements.description: Conducted high-impact seminars and workshops with experts from bKash, Google Developer Group (GDG), Erasmus Mundus Association, bongoDev, and other leading organizations.

achievements.title: Competitive Programming & Tech Community
achievements.description: Built a thriving programming community through beginner programming contests, weekly coding sessions, and mentorship programs, preparing students for national and international competitions.

whySponsor: Sponsoring the Inter Departmental Programming Contest and Math Olympiad 2026 is an exceptional opportunity to connect directly with a highly concentrated pool of top-tier technical talent, software engineers, and analytical minds. Sponsors receive significant exposure through prominent logo placement on banners, backdrops, festoons, contest platforms, and all event creatives, plus ongoing marketing via social media and on-campus campaigns. This event provides a direct recruitment pipeline, positioning your organization as an employer of choice among 7,000+ tech-focused students, with special brand promotional segments and the option to be a distinguished guest at the final event and prize-giving ceremony.

benefits: Logo on all backdrops, side-drops, banners, posters, t-shirts and digital campaigns
Branding in media coverage & press releases
Logo on backdrops, banners, posters, souvenirs, and digital campaigns
Branding in media coverage & digital promotions
Logo on posters, and social media campaigns
